hero.hero_overview: Aldous is a strong late-game hero who can easily kill squishy enemies and deal big damage to turrets and the base. His ultimate helps him see all enemies and chase lone targets or stop pushers. He is weak early, needs help from teammates, and can be useless if enemies stop him from stacking.
hero.hero_strength:
Finisher: Can easily kill squishy heroes like Marksmen and Mages.

Vision: His ultimate reveals all enemy positions for 5-8 sec. 

Chase: Excellent at hunting solo targets.

Anti push: Can stop heroes like Zilong and Sun using his ultimate.

Objective : Deals massive damage to turrets and the enemy base.
hero.hero_weakness:
Babysitter: Absolutely Weak in the early game, needs help from the roamer and mage

NObjectives: Can't give enough support for the team for securing the Turtle

Annoying: Steal the minions of mages and sometimes buff of the core

Chocolate: If the enemy Exp is strong and don't give Aldous enough space for stacking hes pretty much useless in the early to mid game

hero.hero_overview: Aldous is a powerful late-game fighter known for his devastating burst damage and unstoppable global presence. With his skill Contract: Soul Steal, Aldous grows stronger with each stack, allowing him to one-shot squishier enemies with a single empowered punch. His ultimate, Chase Fate, grants him global vision and the ability to dash directly to any enemy hero, making him a deadly threat anywhere on the map. Whether you're split-pushing or diving the backline, Aldous brings fear and destruction with every strike.

hero.hero_overview: Aldous is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB), known for his powerful single-target damage and versatility. As a fighter, he excels in both offense and defense, with his ultimate ability, "Chase Fate," allowing him to target and teleport to a distant enemy, delivering a devastating blow. His abilities focus on high burst damage, making him a strong threat in both the early and late game. Aldous is often used in the sidelanes to apply pressure and take down key enemies in team fights.
hero.hero_strength:
—High Burst Damage: His enhanced basic attacks and ultimate (Fist of the Apocalypse) can deal massive single-target damage, making him a deadly threat to squishy enemies.
—Global Presence: His ultimate allows him to target enemies anywhere on the map, enabling him to assist teammates or eliminate isolated targets across the map.
—Scaling Damage: As a fighter, Aldous becomes stronger as the game progresses, especially when built with damage-dealing items like Endless Battle and Blade of Despair.
—Strong Duellist: Aldous excels in 1v1 fights, capable of taking down key enemies quickly with his burst damage and mobility.
—Good Lane Clear: His Soul Steal allows him to farm efficiently and stack damage for stronger basic attacks, enabling quick wave clears.
hero.hero_weakness:
—Vulnerable to Crowd Control (CC): Stuns, silences, and slows can shut him down, especially during his ultimate.
—Weak in Group Fights: His single-target damage is less effective in large team fights.
—Positioning Dependent: His ultimate relies on good positioning; missing it can waste his burst potential.
—Limited Mobility: Before level 4, his escape and mobility options are limited, making him vulnerable to ganks.
—Relies on Farm and Items: He needs good farm and key items to scale effectively into the late game.
—Easy to Kite: Melee range and limited mobility make him vulnerable to ranged enemies.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on the farm and killing minions in the early game and avoid fighting as much as possible.

emblems.emblem_title: Hard as rock and strong as iron

equips.equip_desc: Extra movement speed, focus on collecting Thunder Belt stacks, and get extra defense from Athena's shield against mage damage. You also have the ability to deal high damage and great penetration.

hero.hero_overview: Aldous is a fighter who can take the experience line and kill minions using the first skill and collect stacks. The more you collect, the more your damage will gradually increase. Aldous is also weak at the beginning of the match and strong at the end of the match.
hero.hero_strength: Aldous is a powerful hero in the end of the game, if you can collect all his stacks. He also has the ability to fly and detect enemy locations on the map, and he can target and kill the damage dealer easily.
hero.hero_weakness: Aldous is a weak champion in the beginning of the match and he is also weak against long range champions.

spell.spell_desc: It helps you attack and get close to the damage-doer and kill him. You can also use it to escape and avoid a losing fight.

dominants.dominant_desc: The best thing to do with aldous is mainly is just to farm and get as much stacks as possible and then when you do is when u can fight the enemy, also try to trigger your passive as much as you can while fighting the enemy, so you can intake excess damage.
dominants.dominant_title: You should not join teamfights in the early game because without good early game damage caused by having no stacks in the beginning you can't really help much,

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem is the fastest emblem u can have on a hero and if you put it on aldous you can really do alot, including out rotating your laner.
I only really put this emblem on aldous if i know im going to snowball the enemy team easily.

equips.equip_desc: This build is good with aldous because this causes him to have 35% Cooldown Reduction which means he can use his first skill more frequetly and farm hes stacks faster, the key item here is thunderbuilt because it grants him movement speed and both magic and physical defense and it can also stack.
I only use this build if i know i can easily snowball the enemy team.

hero.hero_overview: Aldous's role is exp lane, he should only be picked in exp lane and in some instances mid lane. Aldous role is to clear waves, push, and finish off low hp enemy.
hero.hero_strength: Some of the advantages on aldous is that hes passive is really useful in the early game to help him intake damage from who hes laning with, because aldous is really bad in the early game but if he gets hes stacks he can do alot of damage. One of hes other main advantages is if u use support emblem on him he can rotate to lanes faster and clear waves faster and basiclly out rotate and get to objectives faste than who ever hes laning with. Hes ult is also super good because it provides vision on the whole enemy.
hero.hero_weakness: Hes weakness is hes early game is really bad, like for example hes damage because he has low stacks at the start, and hes other weakness is that he has no dash skill.

spell.spell_desc: This spell is the best for aldous because you can catch the enemy off guard by using flicker while having your first skill activated and punching them.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal is good choices for Aldous Tigreal can set the enemy closer together Aldous will can hit them all of them using 1st skill and Aldous hight dmg when using 1st

emblems.emblem_desc: Tanky and can stay in lane longer, and Quantum Charge restores 75-180 HP.

equips.equip_desc: Thunder Belt, Endless Battle, Blade of the Heptaseas, can improve basic attack and Malefic Roar for more damage for tanks. You can change Dominance Ice depending on your enemy, and you can change Tough Boots to Warrior Boots if your enemy is like Yu Zhong.

hero.hero_overview: You should focus on stacking in the early and mid game, once you last hit your minions you should go to mid to get there minions, than go back to your lane.
hero.hero_strength: Since the tank emblem provide 500+225 HP, you can stay in the lane much longer and can stack more instead of recalling. In the late game Aldous is tanky and can 1 hit assassin and marksman.
hero.hero_weakness: Aldous is very weak in early game without stacks, so it's recommend to use tank emblem.

counters.counter_desc: Dyrotth passive with damage reduction its a very big counter for aldous in early, try to call team to help with him, You can try to make your build and stacks to fight him
Hero's like phoveus and terizla or any hero with sustain or with dashing skill in early sustain can make aldou some problem,try to stay behind your tower and take minions

dominants.dominant_desc: Try to stay behind your tower and take your minions, and in any occasions, You can go in mid If midlaner goes on gank other lanes , when you take mid wave,you can go on your Lane to farm minions, and crab,try to use your skill 1 in any ocassions to farm

equips.equip_desc: I chose this build because you have damage and you have Little sustain , tough boots for slow and cc reduction, thunder belt helps you with 1st skill because its considereed basic attack ,endless batle for mana because your 1st skill eat your mana ,malefic roar for penetration and damage ,and rest of items depend on what enemy have and what your teams need

hero.hero_overview: Aldous farming route its bassed on stacks, farm more stacks from any lane, minions offers You stacks,creeps offers You stacks,and hero offers stacks too, maximum number of stacks its 650
hero.hero_strength: Bassed strength its bassed on skill 1 ,and in stacks,more stacks you have,more damage you do and if You want to make maximum number of stacks per minion and hero, try to kill it with your first skill
hero.hero_weakness: Aldous weakness its slow stun and early tanky heroes, because its a little squishy in early, and dont have more damage with her 1st skill, but in late, You can do Something,but depend on what enemy and team you have, because its not a hero who works in all matches and when you have hero whi can freeze your Lane,try to call roamer or mid to help You clear And farm your stacks

spell.spell_desc: Flicker its a good spell for aldous because you can escape from any situation because you dont have and an dash skill, and if you want to kill and enemy and dont reach after him,with flicker you can kill it if its low
